details.change: Added 3 CapabilityId values: ShellExecute, SdkAccess, NetworkFetch
Expanded FALLBACK_MANIFEST from 1 to 11 capabilities for backwards compatibility
Added optional fetch and env fields to PluginInput type

3 P0 fixes: (1) replaced dual-array hooks+registrations with PluginEntry[], (2) removed 8 as any casts from trigger/persistCrash/persistSuccess, (3) fixed silent hook drop at L438. Also added fetch/env to PluginInput construction and used CapabilityIdValues for type-safe capability refs. Net: 281 lines changed across 4 files.
